name: yt-clipper
description: YouTube video clipper built for cloud deployment

scripts.render-build: npm install && mkdir -p downloads && curl -L https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp -o yt-dlp && chmod a+rx yt-dlp && mkdir -p node_modules/yt-dlp-wrap/dist/ && cp yt-dlp node_modules/yt-dlp-wrap/dist/ && ln -s /usr/bin/ffmpeg .
